slice: My World Projects' Repository badge now shows a distinct visible state on every exit path (script unavailable, Supabase not configured, config check throwing, list() failing, or a real Personal/Official match) instead of three different silent no-ops that all looked like plain growing; removed the Duplicate action from project cards, keeping only Rename and Delete. Experience Inspector's Text/Image/Graphics/Colour sections are no longer shown simultaneously -- a new segmented Content Type selector picks exactly one active section at a time (exp.contentKind), non-destructively (switching kinds preserves the other sections' own stored data for later). Enforced at the Engine Adapter boundary, not just the Inspector: ProjectModel._syncUniversalContent only ever mirrors the active kind's Scene Layer, gated by contentKind, so stray data in an inactive section can never still render alongside the active one; updateExperience now re-syncs attachments on every patch (previously only updateExperienceProperty did), so switching kind immediately updates Working View/Runtime Preview instead of waiting for an unrelated edit. Found and fixed a real, pre-existing bug while verifying this end-to-end: addSceneLayer's own field whitelist silently dropped a brand-new Image/Graphics Layer's `image` value entirely (only a later edit, which used a different, unfiltered code path, ever actually set it) -- fixed by explicitly assigning `created.image` right after creation, matching how opacity/fit/sourceExperienceId/contentSlot are already set there.
